nasb.text: having been firmly rooted and now being built up in Him and established in your faith, just as you were instructed, and overflowing with gratitude.

esv.text: rooted and built up in him and established in the faith, just as you were taught, abounding in thanksgiving.

cnv.text: 按著你們所領受的教導，在他裡面扎根、建造，信心堅定，滿有感謝的心。

ccb.text: 按照你们所受的教导在祂里面扎根成长，信心坚固，满怀感恩。

csbs.text: 照着你们所受的教导，在他里面得以扎根、建造，在信仰上得以确立，在感谢中丰足有余。
